channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Pote hole. Long and wide, 7th April
item.description:
Big pot hole

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 4, Ashurst Road, Friern Barnet, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Furniture fly tipped on road, 7th April
item.description:
Sofa and chair thrown and left on both sides of pedestrian walk, partially blocking the walkway

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bloomfield Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pot hole large and deep, 7th April
item.description:
Pot hole needs fixing

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 4, Ashurst Road, Friern Barnet, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Zip wire broken, 7th April
item.description:
Zip wire broken and another zip wire is loose

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): The Oaks, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tip at the twigg close, 7th April
item.description:
They been A fly tip at the top of twigg close and need to be removed please thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Twigg Close, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street drain on other side of road in front of 37 craigton road full of soil, 7th April
item.description:
Previous raised and marked as fixed on 23rd March but checked today 7th April 2026 and it's still full of soil as you can see on the picture

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Craigton Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abusive graffiti, 7th April
item.description:
Please remove asap. Many thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 24, Wateringbury Close, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish including Nitrous Oxide cannisters, 7th April
item.description:
Lots of rubbish left behind after illegal BBQ set up in Millenium Way and mess left behind by clientele of Studio 338 including numerous Nitrous Oxide cannisters, balloons and boxes.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Millennium Way, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large amounts of poo and puddles of urine in the stairwell (Wyersdale block), 7th April
item.description:
There's been poo and puddles of urine in the stairwell and it smells really back. It's not just on one floor but multiple. It's disgusting. It has been there since this morning. I don't know where it's come from.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Woodberry Down Estate, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Barriers & Road signs, 7th April
item.description:
The work on the Pedestrian crossing was finished juat before Easter. These barriers etc are a hazard as motorists have to edge out of Mornington Avenue to see traffic coming from the right. These barriers should have been removed immediately.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mornington Avenue, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Repairs undertaken are almost as bad a hazard as the potholes that preceded them, 7th April
item.description:
Bad road surface with numerous potholes has been ‘repaired’ very poorly. Fill has not been compounded or sealed meaning that the first bit of rain will result in this deteriorating. The whole section of road needed to be resurfaced - this short fix is misspending tax payers money
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 13, Hawley Crescent, Chalk Farm, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish, 7th April
item.description:
I don't know how many times I've reported this now but it has to be at least going on for around six months and it still here? There is a camp here with a little shelter inside of the park and people are using it and then leaving their rubbish behind along with it's a paper that looked like they have been used for toilet activities.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Beckenham Place Park, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping, 7th April
item.description:
Flytipping

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brighton Terrace, Brixton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti needs removing here please, 7th April
item.description:
.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Station Approach Southside, Mottingham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing rubbish, 7th April
item.description:
Overflowing rubbish / needs removal

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Falcon Point Piazza, Southwark, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing bin after bank holiday?, 7th April
item.description:
Bin is overflowing and possibly not working? Looks a mess. Does not the STRA extra cleaning mean it shouldn't get like this?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 50, Shad Thames, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Personal items, including mail, dumped on foot path., 7th April
item.description:
Charlton Park Road, as highlighted has become a regular fly tipping spot. Every week, items are dumped there, such as mattresses, furniture, smashed mirror, paint pots, large metal industrial objects, clothes, cases….the list goes on (I also have photos of these). Apart from being unsightly, this is a hazard for pedestrians, including children, the elderly and disabled. Could warning signs for the fly tippers be put up and possibly street camera’s installed as it appears to be a regular offender.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Charlton Park Lane, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bags of rubbish dumped, 7th April
item.description:
All sorts of rubbish and litter
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 56, Cray Valley Road, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 2 Chitty Street, 7th April
item.description:
An elderly gentlemen fell over and hurt himself badly today. we had to help him up and check if he was ok. This pavement has been like this for months. A lot people are always falling over. It needs to be fixed asap.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 3, Chitty Street, Fitzrovia, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bikes in road and residents parking bay causing obstruction, please remove, 7th April
item.description:
Bikes in road and residents parking bay causing obstruction, please remove

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Meadowbank, Chalk Farm, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
